# cloudfly_ssh_keys (Data Source)

Lists all SSH keys in your CloudFly account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudfly_ssh_keys" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `ssh_keys` (Attributes List) List of SSH keys. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ssh_keys))

<a id="nestedatt--ssh_keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ssh_keys`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `fingerprint` (String)
- `id` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `public_key` (String)
